case_title: STEVE BAUGHMAN VS. INTERNATIONAL EDUCATION AND BUSINESS RESOURCES COR et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUGHMAN, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL EDUCATION AND BUSINESS RESOURCES COR 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: FUTURE VIOLATIONS OF THIS STIP BY DEFT. DEFT SHALL PAY PLNTF.ATTY'S FEES & COSTS PLUS $2,000.00 TO CHARITABLE INSTITUTION OF PLNTF'S CHOICE.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-03-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
